## Test plan

- [ ] Added/updated PHPUnit tests
- [ ] Added/updated Vitest tests

## Quality gate

- [ ] `composer test` passes
- [ ] `composer analyse` passes (PHPStan/Larastan)
- [ ] `composer format` applied (Pint)
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (if user-facing)
- [ ] Docs updated (README / `docs/*.md`) if behavior, config, or commands changed
